---
description: Scaffolds a new React component using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui patterns.
---

Please scaffold a new React frontend component. Request details: {{prompt}}

Required artifacts:
1. Create a functional component matching standard shadcn/ui composition-based design.
2. Use Tailwind CSS for 100% of styling.
3. If the component needs client state, implement an example zustand slice if applicable or just local `useState`.
4. Ensure the component is accessible (use standard ARIA attributes or Radix primitives if needed).
5. Document all Props with strong typescript definitions / JSDoc relying on `.tsx` / `.jsx`.

Follow all rules from `copilot-instructions.md`.
